comment: Excellent, detailed work!  We needed an entire over haul of our front flower beds. The guys came out and worked in between the rain showers and completed in one day. It was a great experience from start to finish. Highly recommend Mean Green Lawn & Landscape and are very thankfully for Evelin & Denisse for their help with everything!!
draft_response: We appreciate you taking the time, Kelli. Your feedback on the lawn care service is exactly the kind of detail that helps us maintain the Black Hill Standard across every property. Thank you for choosing Black Hill Landscaping.
